## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally.
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .` passes locally.
- [ ] Examples use synthetic data only.
- [ ] No real secrets, customer data, or private repository contents are included.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when user-facing behavior changed.

## Safety notes

If this change affects redaction, ignore rules, symlink handling, or output formats, explain the safety impact and any limitations.
